subsection.heading: Requirements for Approval.—
subsection.content: Except as provided in section 15304(c)(3), decisions by the Commission shall require the affirmative vote of the Federal Cochairperson and a majority of the State members or alternate State members, including designees (exclusive of members representing States delinquent under section 15304(c)(3)(C)).

subsection.heading: Consultation.—
subsection.content: In matters coming before the Commission, the Federal Cochairperson shall, to the extent practicable, consult with the Federal departments and agencies having an interest in the subject matter.

paragraph.heading: In general.—
paragraph.content: Subject to paragraph (2), a Commission shall determine what constitutes a quorum for meetings of the Commission.

paragraph.heading: Requirements.—
paragraph.chapeau: Any quorum for meetings of a Commission shall include—

subparagraph.content: the Federal Cochairperson or the alternate Federal Cochairperson; and
a majority of State members or alternate State members, including designees (exclusive of members representing States delinquent under section 15304(c)(3)(C)).

subsection.heading: Projects and Grant Proposals.—
subsection.content: The approval of project and grant proposals shall be a responsibility of each Commission and shall be carried out in accordance with section 15503.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Pub. L. 110–234 and Pub. L. 110–246 enacted identical sections. Pub. L. 110–234 was repealed by section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2025—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 118–272, § 2242(b)(1), inserted “or alternate State members, including designees” after “State members”.

Subsec. (c). Pub. L. 118–272, § 2242(b)(2), added subsec. (c) and struck out former subsec. (c). Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “A Commission shall determine what constitutes a quorum for Commission meetings; except that—
“(1) any quorum shall include the Federal Cochairperson or the alternate Federal Cochairperson; and
“(2) a State alternate member shall not be counted toward the establishment of a quorum.”

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on the first day of the first fiscal year beginning after June 18, 2008, see section 14217(d) of Pub. L. 110–246, set out as a note under section 15101 of this title.
